reproducible_artifact: A senior-engineer substrate-stability quarterly: a brief written audit each quarter on (a) the technical positions held that did not bend with the last cycle's outcome, (b) the technical positions that did bend, and (c) for the latter, whether situational reality required the bend or whether the bend was substrate-driven. The diagnostic is whether (b) intersected with (c) — substrate moved without situational reason.
verdict_reason: The verse's operational reflection is reproducible as a senior-engineer quarterly self-audit. Falsifiable: the engineer either can or cannot point to a non-trivial technical position they held across a tough cycle outcome. The implication field gives the diagnostic question explicitly. Pass.
